mutation_policy: Version-1 protocol, manifest, and bound inputs are immutable historical records. This document proposes version-2 bindings only; it is not a freeze and not a registry entry.

proposed_version_2_source_set.rule: A future version-2 protocol and canonical manifest must declare identical complete source-ID sets before coding.

documentary_sources.binding_policy: Retain current locator; recompute digest at freeze time and require protocol/manifest agreement.
Must appear in both protocol and manifest source sets for version 2.
Retain current locator; recompute digest at freeze time.

proposed_version_2_source_set.case_binding_policy: Case locators and recorded digests remain governed by the frozen v1 metadata and the repository case-access containment policy. This package does not open case bodies and does not recompute case digests.

digest_lineage_observed_in_repository_hi.note: Bytes bound by taxonomy protocol-v1; historically present at subject-admission integration revision 4a038b0ae4e7.
Digest reported as current by the taxonomy execution-readiness review at study-freeze integration revision 51acfe3a8df8.
Current tip bytes at package baseline a4d027910beca3773342e960b7d125b5c4cb787e.

milestone_binding_policy.selected_policy_rationale: The protocol's own consequence for an incorrect milestone source is to revise questions and thresholds before freeze. Because version 1 is already frozen, version 2 must not silently choose convenient bytes. Transparent rebinding of the current milestone document requires recomputing the digest at freeze, disclosing that post-freeze milestone edits occurred, and re-checking every competency question and threshold against the rebound text. Preserving a historical byte snapshot remains an alternative only if a later freeze package includes those exact bytes as an immutable bound artifact; this pre-result package does not invent a private shadow milestone.
explicitly_rejected: Silent selection of whichever M1_FOUNDATION.md bytes happen to exist at execution time without freeze rebinding.
Editing protocol-v1 or the version-1 canonical manifest in place to change the milestone digest.

claim_boundary: This reconciliation is not a frozen protocol, canonical study record, finding, or execution authorization.
Case contents were not accessed while authoring this artifact.
No scientific claim about the candidate taxonomy is made or implied.
